A4A A4A_REENTRY_DT (A4A) Reentry Date DATE 8 Identification and background information: date of reentry.
39 A4B A4B_ADMIT_FROM (A4B) Admitted From CHAR 1 Identification and background information: admitted from (at reentry) 1 = Private home/apt. with no home health services, 2 = Private home/apt. with home health services, 3 = Board and care/assisted living/group home, 4 = Nursing home, 5 = Acute Care Hospital, 6 = Psychiatric Hospital, MR/DD facility, 7 = Rehabilitation Hospital, 8 = Other
40
